purpose: Phase 3 Evidence Vault data model for Matrix Reprogrammed. This file defines source lanes, source cards, claim boundaries, correction rules, and public-record source discipline.
claimRules: A name in a record is not proof of wrongdoing.
A symbol is not proof of conspiracy.
An adverse-event report is not proof of causation.
A relationship line must say what it means.
Unsupported viral claims are quarantined or rejected.

sourceLanes.title: Court Records
sourceLanes.summary: Dockets, filings, exhibits, indictments, judgments, depositions, settlements, transcripts, and public legal records.
sourceLanes.boundary: A filing can contain allegations, denials, exhibits, sworn claims, and adjudicated findings. Do not collapse them into the same proof category.

sourceLanes.title: Declassified Archives
sourceLanes.summary: Agency reading rooms, national archives, historic releases, FOIA libraries, and public declassification collections.
sourceLanes.boundary: A declassified document proves the document exists and says what it says. It still needs context, date, classification history, and provenance.

sourceLanes.title: Financial Records
sourceLanes.summary: Sanctions, regulator actions, contracts, procurement, lobbying, settlements, fines, grants, and compensation schemes.
sourceLanes.boundary: A payment, contract, fine, grant, or sanction is a public-record signal. It must not be inflated into a claim beyond what the record supports.

sourceLanes.title: Human Cost Sources
sourceLanes.summary: Conflict deaths, displacement, migration categories, missing migrants, food insecurity, compensation totals, and public-health data boundaries.
sourceLanes.boundary: Do not merge incompatible datasets. An encounter, death estimate, asylum application, compensated claim, report, and proven causation are different categories.

sourceLanes.title: Symbolic / Fraternal Records
sourceLanes.summary: Public lodge material, architecture, mission patches, logos, ritual language, degree systems, symbolism, and esoteric interpretation.
sourceLanes.boundary: Symbolic similarity is not proof of conspiracy. Public records and interpretation must stay separated.

sourceLanes.title: Intelligence Oversight
sourceLanes.summary: Congressional hearings, parliamentary committees, inspector-general reports, official reviews, and oversight failure records.
sourceLanes.boundary: Oversight records are powerful but bounded. Separate proven findings, committee conclusions, minority views, allegations, and political framing.

sourceCards.title: CIA CREST / Reading Room
sourceCards.description: CIA public reading room and declassified document search lane.
sourceCards.useFor: CIA, covert action history, intelligence oversight, declassified-source tracing.

sourceCards.title: FBI Vault
sourceCards.description: FBI public document library for historic files and released records.
sourceCards.useFor: Organized crime, intelligence history, public-record dossiers, source verification.

sourceCards.title: U.S. National Archives
sourceCards.description: National archival records, historical government material, and public collections.
sourceCards.useFor: Historic state records, declassification context, provenance checks.

sourceCards.title: U.S. Treasury OFAC Sanctions
sourceCards.description: Sanctions records for individuals, entities, networks, vessels, companies, and jurisdictions.
sourceCards.useFor: Cartels, underground finance, state-linked networks, procurement and sanctions mapping.

sourceCards.title: U.S. Department of Justice
sourceCards.description: Official DOJ releases, indictments, case announcements, plea records, and enforcement updates.
sourceCards.useFor: Cartels, organized crime, corruption cases, contractor cases, public-record legal summaries.

sourceCards.title: U.S. Customs and Border Protection Statistics
sourceCards.description: Border encounter and enforcement statistics with category boundaries.
sourceCards.useFor: Migration flow analysis, border-contact categories, dataset distinction warnings.

sourceCards.title: Frontex Migratory Map
sourceCards.description: European irregular border-crossing route statistics and risk-analysis map.
sourceCards.useFor: EU migration, route-specific irregular crossing categories, border pressure analysis.

sourceCards.title: UNHCR Refugee Statistics
sourceCards.description: Refugees, asylum seekers, displaced people, and forced-displacement statistics.
sourceCards.useFor: Human cost, displacement, war consequences, asylum category boundaries.

sourceCards.title: IOM Missing Migrants Project
sourceCards.description: Route-specific migrant deaths and missing-persons data with undercount warnings.
sourceCards.useFor: Migration human cost, route-level risk, missing migrants, dataset limits.

sourceCards.title: VAERS Data
sourceCards.description: U.S. vaccine adverse-event reporting system with explicit causation limitation.
sourceCards.useFor: Medical power analysis, adverse-event signal boundaries, causation warnings.

sourceCards.title: HRSA Vaccine Injury Compensation Program
sourceCards.description: Official VICP compensation program information and reporting route.
sourceCards.useFor: Vaccine compensation, paid claims, injury table boundaries, medical power source discipline.

sourceCards.title: HRSA Countermeasures Injury Compensation Program
sourceCards.description: Official CICP countermeasure injury compensation information.
sourceCards.useFor: COVID countermeasure claims, paid/pending claim distinction, compensation boundary.
